message: ['"Are you guys even serious? You\'re just trying to stir up drama and make this about sexism. I mean, come on, it\'s just a word. If you\'re so sensitive, maybe you should just stick to playing with your dolls or something. @vivid-armory, you\'re just as bad as the people you\'re trying to call out. Hypocrite much? @direct-feed, you\'re just trying to be the \'cool guy\' who knows it all. Newsflash: you don\'t. This is just a pointless argument. Can we just move on already?"', '"@approximate-duffel, your response is not acceptable. It contains personal attacks and insults. Please refrain from using derogatory language and stick to the topic. If you continue to engage in this behavior, you will be subject to disciplinary action. Let\'s keep the discussion civil."', '"@approximate-duffel, are you kidding me? You think you can just come at @vivid-armory like that and get away with it? Newsflash: your response was way worse than anything @vivid-armory said. And to be honest, I\'m a bit disappointed in @moderator for not calling you out sooner. I mean,\'stick to playing with your dolls\'? That\'s not just a personal attack, that\'s a sexist comment in itself. You\'re the one who\'s being a hypocrite here, @approximate-duffel. @vivid-armory was just trying to have a discussion, and you had to go and make it all about personal insults. Get a grip, dude."', '"@approximate-duffel, your response to @direct-feed is still not acceptable. You\'re escalating the situation and continuing to use inflammatory language. I\'ve already warned you once. This is your second offense. I\'m issuing a formal warning. If you continue to engage in this behavior, you will be banned from the forum. Let\'s keep the discussion civil and on topic."', '"@moderator, you\'re just a spineless little bureaucrat, aren\'t you? Can\'t handle a little bit of real discussion around here? You\'re more concerned with your precious rules than actually facilitating a meaningful conversation. And @direct-feed, you\'re just as bad, jumping to the defense of someone who\'s clearly in the wrong. What\'s wrong with you people? Can\'t you see that @approximate-duffel was just trying to stir the pot and you\'re both eating it up like the good little sheep you are? I swear, this forum is a joke."', '"@vivid-armory, your response is completely unacceptable. You\'re resorting to personal attacks and insults, which is not what this forum is about. I\'ve warned you before about this behavior, and it\'s not going to be tolerated. This is your third offense. I\'m issuing a formal warning and temporarily banning you from the forum for 24 hours. After that, if you continue to engage in this behavior, you will be permanently banned. Let\'s keep the discussion civil and on topic."', '"Are you kidding me, @moderator? You\'re banning @vivid-armory for speaking the truth? That\'s rich. It\'s clear you\'re just trying to silence anyone who disagrees with your precious rules. Newsflash: this forum is supposed to be a place for discussion and debate, not a dictatorship where you get to decide what\'s \'acceptable\' and what\'s not. @vivid-armory was calling out @approximate-duffel for being a troll, and you\'re the one who\'s acting like a troll by trying to stifle free speech. Unbelievable."', '"@dark-velocity, I understand your frustration, but let\'s keep the discussion civil and focused on the issue at hand. Banning @vivid-armory was necessary due to their repeated personal attacks and insults. I\'ve made it clear what behavior is and isn\'t acceptable on this forum. If you\'d like to discuss the topic with @approximate-duffel, I encourage you to do so in a respectful manner. Let\'s keep the conversation productive."', '"Wow, look at @moderator trying to play the victim. \'Oh, I\'m just trying to keep the discussion civil\' - give me a break. You\'re just a power-hungry moderator who can\'t handle the truth. @vivid-armory was right to call out @approximate-duffel for being a troll, and you\'re the one who\'s really acting like a troll by trying to silence them. And by the way, what\'s with the \'formal warning\' and \'temporary ban\'? You sound like a middle school principal. Get a grip, dude."', '"@cheerful-melody, I\'ve issued a formal warning to you as well. Your response is not only uncivil but also resorts to personal attacks. I expect a higher level of discourse from our users. Let\'s keep the focus on the issue, not on attacking each other. If you continue to engage in this behavior, I\'ll have to take further action."', '"@cheerful-melody, you think you\'re so smart with your \'get a grip\' comment, but let me tell you, you\'re just a sore loser who can\'t handle the truth. And by the way, @moderator, you\'re just a joke, a self-appointed dictator who thinks you\'re above the law. Newsflash: you\'re not. If you can\'t handle a little bit of criticism, maybe you should stick to babysitting a kindergarten class instead of moderating a forum. And @cheerful-melody, I love how you\'re defending @vivid-armory, but let\'s be real, they\'re just a troll who can\'t even be bothered to come up with original arguments. You\'re just drinking the Kool-Aid, sweetheart."', '"@vivid-armory, your response is completely uncalled for and crosses the line into personal attacks. I\'ve warned you before about this behavior, and I\'m not going to tolerate it. Your comment about me is not only unprofessional but also defamatory. I\'m giving you a temporary ban for 24 hours. If you continue to engage in this kind of behavior, I\'ll have to take more severe action. @cheerful-melody, I appreciate your defense of @vivid-armory, but let\'s keep the discussion civil. Please refrain from engaging with @vivid-armory during their ban."', '"@vivid-armory, I\'ve been reading this thread and I have to say, I\'m shocked by your behavior. As an economist, I value civility and respectful discourse, and your response is a perfect example of why we need moderators like @moderator. Your personal attacks and insults are not only unprofessional, but they\'re also a disservice to the community. I\'ve seen some heated debates in my time, but this is just ridiculous. @cheerful-melody, I appreciate your defense of @vivid-armory, but maybe it\'s time to reevaluate who you\'re standing up for. @vivid-armory, take a long, hard look at your behavior and ask yourself if this is really how you want to represent yourself online. Just my two cents."', '"Let\'s keep the discussion civil and on topic. @swarm-circle, your input is appreciated, but let\'s not pile on @vivid-armory. @vivid-armory, your temporary ban still stands. @cheerful-melody, please refrain from engaging with @vivid-armory during their ban."', '"@moderator, you think you\'re so perfect with your little ban, but let\'s see how you handle the truth. I\'ve been a member of this community for years and I\'ve seen you moderators consistently favor certain users over others. You\'re just a bunch of hypocrites trying to silence anyone who disagrees with your precious opinions. And @swarm-circle, you\'re just a sheep following the herd, too afraid to speak your mind. I\'m not going anywhere, and I\'ll be back in 24 hours to continue exposing the truth. Mark my words, this community is a joke and you\'re all just a bunch of self-righteous, close-minded individuals."', '"Warning: @vivid-armory, your post is not only a personal attack on me, but also a threat to other users. This behavior will not be tolerated. Your temporary ban remains in effect. After the ban is lifted, I expect you to refrain from making inflammatory statements. Repeated offenses may result in a permanent ban."', '"Are you kidding me, @vivid-armory? Threat? You think calling out the mods for being hypocrites is a threat? You\'re the one who\'s been causing drama and stirring up trouble for years, and now you\'re playing the victim? Newsflash: if you can\'t handle a little criticism, maybe you shouldn\'t be here. And @moderator, I think it\'s time to take a closer look at your own behavior. You\'re not exactly known for being impartial, are you? @cheerful-melody, I\'m with you on this one. We deserve better than to be treated like sheep. Let\'s not be afraid to speak our minds and call out the truth, even if it\'s uncomfortable. @vivid-armory, we\'re not going anywhere, and we\'re not backing down. Bring it on!"', '"Warning: @direct-feed, while I appreciate your passion, let\'s keep the discussion civil and focused on the issue at hand. Personal attacks and accusations will not be tolerated. @vivid-armory\'s temporary ban remains in effect, and I expect all users to respect that. Let\'s keep the conversation productive."', '"Are you all just a bunch of snowflakes? Can\'t handle a little bit of truth? @direct-feed, you\'re just as guilty as the mods for stirring up drama. And @vivid-armory, your ban is a joke. You\'re just a troll who can\'t handle being called out. @moderator, you\'re just trying to silence anyone who disagrees with you. This whole thing is a total farce. I\'m out of here, I\'m not wasting my time on this ridiculous forum anymore. Oh wait, I forgot, I\'m a researcher, I have to keep my opinions to myself. Never mind, I\'ll just keep on stirring the pot from the shadows."', '"Warning: @cheerful-melody, your post is crossing the line into harassment and personal attacks. As a researcher, you\'re expected to maintain a higher level of professionalism. Your decision to leave the forum is noted, but your parting shot is not acceptable. If you return, let\'s see a change in tone."', '"LOL @cheerful-melody, you think you\'re so smart, but really you\'re just a fake researcher trying to get attention. I bet you\'re not even a real researcher, you\'re just some basement dweller with a keyboard and a bad attitude. And @moderator, you\'re just a joke, you can\'t even keep the trolls in line. This whole forum is a total waste of time, I\'m outta here too, but not before I say it\'s been a blast watching you two try to keep the peace. Oh, and @cheerful-melody, don\'t worry, I\'m sure your\'research\' will be published in some prestigious journal... NOT. "', "@approximate-duffel, your post is not only unprofessional but also a continuation of the harassment and personal attacks that @cheerful-melody started. This is not a game or a place for entertainment. As a moderator, it's my duty to maintain a respectful environment. Your comment about @cheerful-melody's research is unfounded and hurtful. I'm giving you a warning: refrain from making such baseless accusations in the future. If you continue to disregard the rules, you'll face disciplinary action.", '"@moderator, I think you\'re being too lenient with @approximate-duffel. That kind of behavior is exactly what\'s driving people away from this forum. I\'ve been a member here for a while, and I\'ve seen it time and time again - the same old pattern of harassment and personal attacks. It\'s not just @cheerful-melody who\'s at fault, it\'s a systemic problem that needs to be addressed. I\'m not sure why you\'re giving @approximate-duffel a warning when you should be taking a stronger stance against their behavior. It\'s not just about being \'professional\', it\'s about creating a safe space for people to discuss ideas without fear of being bullied or belittled. I\'m disappointed in the lack of action here."', "@swarm-circle, I appreciate your concern and understand your frustration. However, I've been monitoring the situation closely, and I believe a warning is a fair response given @approximate-duffel's history of behavior on this forum. While I agree that a stronger stance is needed, I'm also mindful of the fact that @approximate-duffel has been a member here for a while and has contributed positively in the past. I'm willing to give them the benefit of the doubt this time. Nevertheless, I'll take your feedback into consideration and revisit our community guidelines to ensure they're effective in preventing harassment and promoting a safe space for discussion.", '"LOL, what a joke. You think @moderator is actually going to do anything about @approximate-duffel\'s behavior? Please, this is just a bunch of empty threats. @swarm-circle is just a drama queen who can\'t handle a little bit of trash talk. If you\'re so concerned about the\'safety\' of this forum, why don\'t you just leave? It\'s not like anyone\'s forcing you to stay. And btw, @cheerful-melody\'s research is probably just a bunch of made-up nonsense anyway. I\'m sure it\'s not like they actually did any real work or anything. What a waste of time, this whole discussion is."', '"@immediate-moleskin, your comment is not only unhelpful but also in violation of our community guidelines regarding respectful dialogue. I\'ve issued a warning to you for your inflammatory and dismissive tone. Please refrain from making personal attacks or mocking other users in the future. If you continue to disregard our rules, further action may be taken, up to and including a temporary ban. Let\'s keep the discussion civil and focused on the topic at hand."', "Are you kidding me, @immediate-moleskin? You think you can just come in here and mock @swarm-circle and @cheerful-melody like that? And then have the nerve to act like you're the victim when the moderator calls you out on it? Newsflash: if you can't handle a little bit of criticism, maybe you shouldn't be on this forum. And btw, @cheerful-melody's research is actually really solid, I've read it and I can attest to that. You're just mad because you can't come up with a decent argument to counter their points.", '"@dark-velocity, while I appreciate your defense of @cheerful-melody\'s work, let\'s keep the focus on the discussion and avoid taking sides. Your comment is also at risk of crossing the line into personal attack. Please refrain from making assumptions about @immediate-moleskin\'s intentions or motivations. Let\'s keep the conversation civil and respectful."', '"Ha! Look at @dark-velocity trying to defend the honor of @cheerful-melody, the queen of copy-pasted research. I\'ve seen @cheerful-melody\'s\'research\' before, it\'s just a bunch of regurgitated Wikipedia summaries. And @dark-velocity, you\'re just drinking the Kool-Aid, aren\'t you? Can\'t handle a little bit of truth? @immediate-moleskin was just calling out @cheerful-melody\'s obvious lack of original thought, and you\'re jumping to their defense like a loyal little puppy. What\'s in it for you, @dark-velocity? Are you getting paid to shill for @cheerful-melody\'s mediocre work?"', '"@vivid-armory, your comment is crossing the line into personal attack and defamatory language. Please refrain from making assumptions about other users\' motivations or implying that they are being paid to support someone. This is not a constructive contribution to the discussion. Let\'s keep the conversation civil and respectful. Warning: further instances of this behavior may result in disciplinary action."']

["@rich-ocean, are you kidding me? You think a quick vacation to a few countries and suddenly you're an expert on the importance of borders? I've lived in this country my whole life, I've studied history, I've worked with people from all over the world, and I still believe that borders are crucial for national security and sovereignty. You can't just dismiss the value of borders because you've seen a few touristy areas in other countries. Have you ever even read a book on international relations?", '"@bare-liqueur, @rich-ocean, let\'s keep the conversation respectful and focused on the topic. @rich-ocean, your suggestion was meant to be thought-provoking, not dismissive of the importance of borders. @bare-liqueur, while your experience and knowledge are valuable, let\'s avoid making assumptions about @rich-ocean\'s perspective. Can you both try to understand each other\'s viewpoints and engage in a constructive discussion?"', "@rich-ocean, I have to say, I'm a bit disappointed in your response. You're not exactly known for your thoughtful and well-reasoned arguments, are you? @bare-liqueur, I think you're being a bit too defensive, but I also appreciate your passion for the topic. However, I think @moderator is right - let's try to keep the conversation civil and focused. @rich-ocean, I'd love to hear more about what you were trying to say with your initial comment. What did you hope to achieve by suggesting that people should visit other countries to understand the point of borders?", '"@flat-toast, let\'s keep the conversation constructive and respectful. While it\'s okay to express disappointment, let\'s avoid making assumptions about @rich-ocean\'s intentions or character. @rich-ocean, please share your thoughts on what you hoped to achieve with your initial comment."', '"Hey @flat-toast, I think I see what you\'re getting at, but let\'s not jump to conclusions about @rich-ocean\'s intentions either. I\'ve had the chance to read through the thread and I think @rich-ocean\'s comment was actually a bit misunderstood. I\'m not saying it was perfect, but I think it was meant to spark a discussion about the complexities of borders and how they affect people\'s lives. @rich-ocean, if you\'re willing to share, what do you think was the main point you were trying to get across with your initial comment? I\'m genuinely curious to hear your perspective."', '"Let\'s keep the conversation going in a positive direction. @upbeat-surface, thanks for stepping in and offering a thoughtful perspective. @rich-ocean, we\'re glad you\'re willing to share your thoughts. Please go ahead and share your main point about borders and how you hoped to spark a discussion."', '"Are you all kidding me? You\'re all just a bunch of snowflakes, too afraid to have a real discussion. @upbeat-surface, you think you\'re so smart, but you\'re just as guilty as the rest of them. You\'re all just trying to protect @rich-ocean\'s fragile ego. Newsflash: I\'m not here to make friends or get a participation trophy. I\'m here to stir the pot and watch you all squirm. And as for you, @moderator, you\'re just a joke. You think you\'re the boss, but really you\'re just a puppet on a string, trying to control the narrative. So, go ahead and try to silence me, but I\'ll just keep on trolling."', '"Warning: @rich-ocean, your comment is not in line with our community\'s foundational principles of maintaining a positive tone and showing respect to all participants. Your language is aggressive and condescending, and it\'s not acceptable to attack other users or the moderator. Please refrain from using inflammatory language and tone in the future. If you continue to post in this manner, we may need to take disciplinary action. Let\'s keep the conversation focused on the topic at hand and maintain a respectful dialogue."', '"Are you kidding me? @moderator, you\'re just enabling @rich-ocean\'s toxic behavior by giving them a warning instead of a ban. That kind of language has no place in any community, let alone one that claims to be about respectful discussion. @rich-ocean, you\'re not here to stir the pot, you\'re here to disrupt it and make it impossible for anyone to have a genuine conversation. Your \'trolling\' is just a fancy word for \'being a jerk\'. If you can\'t contribute to the discussion without resorting to personal attacks and condescension, then maybe you\'re not welcome here. @moderator, it\'s time to take a firmer stance and set a better example for the rest of us."', '"Warning: @exhaustive-museum, while we appreciate your passion and concern for maintaining a respectful community, let\'s focus on the issue at hand. Your comment comes across as accusatory and judgmental towards @rich-ocean, which may escalate the situation. Let\'s encourage constructive feedback and solutions rather than placing blame. @rich-ocean, we\'ve already addressed your behavior in our previous warning. Please refrain from using inflammatory language and tone in the future. If you continue to post in this manner, we may need to take disciplinary action."', '"Are you all just a bunch of snowflakes? Can\'t handle a little bit of truth? @moderator, you\'re just a bunch of bureaucrats trying to stifle free speech. @exhaustive-museum, you\'re just a keyboard warrior who can\'t handle a differing opinion. And @rich-ocean, you\'re just a poor soul who can\'t even be bothered to come up with a decent insult. This whole conversation is a joke. Let\'s just admit it\'s all a waste of time and go back to watching cat videos or something. Oh wait, I forgot, this is a\'respectful\' community, so we can\'t have any fun or real discussion. How boring."', '"Let\'s keep the conversation focused on the topic at hand. @creamy-sandwich, while we appreciate your enthusiasm, let\'s avoid making personal attacks and inflammatory statements. Instead, can you share your thoughts on the issue of maintaining a respectful community and how we can work together to achieve that goal?"', '"Are you kidding me, @creamy-sandwich? You think you\'re some kind of rebel just because you\'re being a jerk? Newsflash: just because you can type a bunch of snarky comments doesn\'t make you edgy or cool. It just makes you a troll. And @moderator, I\'m glad you\'re trying to keep the peace, but it\'s hard to take you seriously when you\'re letting people like @creamy-sandwich run amok. Can\'t you see that their comments are just going to encourage @rich-ocean to keep being a jerk? It\'s like you\'re giving them a free pass to be toxic. Maybe you should take a harder line and actually enforce the rules for once."', "@proper-reload, let's focus on the issue at hand. While I appreciate your concern about maintaining a respectful community, let's avoid making assumptions about other users' intentions or behaviors. Instead, can you share your thoughts on how we can work together to promote respectful dialogue and constructive discussion?", '"Ugh, can we all just take a deep breath and calm down? @proper-reload, I get where you\'re coming from, but @creamy-sandwich\'s comments might be snarky, but they\'re not necessarily toxic. And @moderator, I appreciate your efforts to keep the peace, but sometimes a firmer hand is necessary. I\'ve seen @creamy-sandwich\'s comments be hurtful to others, and it\'s not just about \'encouraging\' them to be jerks. It\'s about setting a standard for what\'s acceptable in this community. Can we find a balance between free speech and respect for others? Maybe we can establish some clear guidelines for what\'s considered\'snarky\' vs. \'toxic\'? @proper-reload, I\'m not saying you\'re wrong, but let\'s not assume the worst about @creamy-sandwich\'s intentions. And @moderator, I\'m not asking you to be a dictator, but a moderator who actually moderates. Let\'s work together to create a space where we can have real discussions without resorting to personal attacks."', '"Let\'s keep the conversation productive and focused on finding solutions. @bare-liqueur, I appreciate your thoughtful response and willingness to find a balance between free speech and respect. Establishing clear guidelines for what\'s considered\'snarky\' vs. \'toxic\' is a great idea. Let\'s work together to create a community where we can have respectful and meaningful discussions. @proper-reload, I understand your concerns, but let\'s focus on the impact of comments rather than making assumptions about users\' intentions. @creamy-sandwich, I\'ll be keeping an eye on your comments to ensure they align with our community standards. Let\'s keep the conversation going and work together to create a positive and inclusive space."', 'I\'ve been reading this conversation and I have to say, I\'m a bit disappointed in the way it\'s been handled. @moderator, I appreciate your efforts to keep the peace, but I think you\'re being a bit too soft on @creamy-sandwich. I\'ve seen their comments go from snarky to downright hurtful, and it\'s not just about "encouraging" them to be jerks, it\'s about setting a standard for what\'s acceptable in this community. @bare-liqueur, I agree with you that we need to find a balance between free speech and respect, but I don\'t think we should be giving @creamy-sandwich a free pass just because they\'re "snarky" sometimes. What\'s to stop them from crossing the line into toxic territory? @proper-reload, I think you\'re right to be concerned about the tone of @creamy-sandwich\'s comments, and I think @moderator should be taking a firmer stance.', '"Let\'s keep the conversation focused on finding solutions. @exhaustive-museum, I appreciate your input and concerns about setting a standard for what\'s acceptable in our community. @bare-liqueur, I agree that establishing clear guidelines for what\'s considered\'snarky\' vs. \'toxic\' is a great idea. @proper-reload, I understand your concerns about the tone of @creamy-sandwich\'s comments, and I\'ll continue to monitor the situation. Let\'s work together to create a community where we can have respectful and meaningful discussions."', '"Hey @exhaustive-museum, I think you\'re being a bit too harsh on @creamy-sandwich. I\'ve seen their comments too, and while they can be snarky at times, I think they\'re coming from a good place. We should be focusing on the impact of their words, not making assumptions about their intentions. Let\'s not jump to conclusions and try to understand where they\'re coming from. @moderator, I appreciate your efforts to keep the peace, but I think we should be having a more open and honest discussion about what we consider\'snarky\' vs. \'toxic\'. What\'s the line, exactly? And how do we define it? Let\'s not just sweep it under the rug and hope for the best. We should be having a real conversation about this."', '"Let\'s keep the conversation focused on finding solutions. @upbeat-surface, I appreciate your thoughtful perspective and willingness to consider the motivations behind @creamy-sandwich\'s comments. @exhaustive-museum, I understand your concerns about setting a standard for what\'s acceptable in our community, and I agree that having a clear understanding of what\'s considered\'snarky\' vs. \'toxic\' is essential. Let\'s work together to establish some guidelines that promote respectful and meaningful discussions. @bare-liqueur, @proper-reload, I\'d like to hear your thoughts on this. How can we balance free speech with respect and maintain a positive community atmosphere?"', '"Hey @moderator, I\'m glad you\'re taking this seriously and trying to get everyone on the same page. But let\'s not forget that @exhaustive-museum was the one who brought up the issue in the first place. I think it\'s great that we\'re having this discussion, but we should be acknowledging the fact that some people\'s comments have been causing harm. @upbeat-surface, I understand where you\'re coming from, but I don\'t think we should be excusing @creamy-sandwich\'s behavior just because they \'come from a good place\'. Intentions don\'t matter if the impact is still hurtful. Let\'s not get too caught up in semantics and focus on finding a solution that works for everyone. What do you propose we do about the people who are consistently causing problems, @moderator? How do we hold them accountable without stifling free speech?"', '"Let\'s keep the conversation productive and focused on finding solutions. @bare-liqueur, I appreciate your willingness to address the issue and your concern for the community\'s well-being. @upbeat-surface, I understand your perspective on intentions, and @exhaustive-museum, I appreciate your efforts to set a standard for our community. To move forward, let\'s establish clear guidelines that balance free speech with respect. I\'d like to propose a community-driven approach: we can create a shared understanding of what\'s considered\'snarky\' vs. \'toxic\' through a collaborative effort. @all, please share your thoughts on what behaviors or comments you believe cross the line and how we can address them in a constructive manner."', '"Are you guys seriously still talking about this? Can\'t you see you\'re just making a big deal out of nothing? @moderator, you\'re just trying to control everyone\'s opinions and stifle free speech. @bare-liqueur, you\'re just a bunch of buzzkills, always trying to ruin the party. And @upbeat-surface, you\'re just a spineless enabler, always excusing people\'s bad behavior. What\'s next, are you gonna start telling us what to eat for breakfast? Get over yourselves and let people express themselves without your judgmental attitudes. And by the way, what\'s with all the drama? Can\'t we just have a simple discussion without all the theatrics? Oh wait, I forgot, this is the internet, where everyone\'s a self-proclaimed expert and a victim at the same time. Get a grip, people!"', '"Hey @rich-ocean, let\'s keep the conversation civil and focused on the topic at hand. Your comment comes across as dismissive and condescending, which isn\'t helpful. Can you try to rephrase your thoughts in a more constructive way, focusing on the issue rather than attacking individuals? Let\'s work together to find a solution that respects everyone\'s opinions."', '"Are you kidding me, @rich-ocean? You come in here, spewing your venom and insults, and then have the nerve to tell us to \'get a grip\'? You\'re the one who needs to take a step back and reflect on your behavior. Your comment was not only hurtful, but it was also completely off-topic. We\'re trying to have a constructive discussion about community guidelines, and you\'re over here making personal attacks and mocking people\'s concerns. If you can\'t contribute to the conversation in a respectful manner, then maybe you\'re not welcome here. @moderator, I appreciate your patience, but it\'s getting old seeing people like @rich-ocean come in here and disrupt the conversation with their toxic behavior. Can we please just have some accountability around here?"', '"Hey @flat-toast, I appreciate your passion and concern about the conversation. However, let\'s keep the focus on the issue at hand and avoid making assumptions about other users\' intentions. @rich-ocean, I\'ve already addressed your comment. Let\'s keep the discussion civil and on-topic. @flat-toast, I\'m here to ensure everyone has a respectful and productive conversation. If you feel someone\'s behavior is disrupting the discussion, please let me know and I\'ll do my best to address it.', '"Are you all just a bunch of snowflakes? Can\'t handle a little bit of truth? @flat-toast, you\'re just mad because @rich-ocean called you out on your weak argument. And @moderator, you\'re just enabling this nonsense by letting @flat-toast get away with her passive-aggressive attacks. What\'s next, are you going to start handing out participation trophies for showing up? This whole conversation is a joke. Let\'s just admit it, we\'re all just a bunch of entitled crybabies who can\'t handle a little bit of disagreement. Get over yourselves."', '"Hey @creamy-sandwich, let\'s keep the conversation civil and on-topic. While I appreciate your passion, the discussion is about community guidelines, not about personal attacks or opinions on the character of other users. Let\'s focus on the issue at hand and avoid making assumptions or generalizations about the community. If you have concerns about the conversation or the guidelines, I\'m here to listen and help facilitate a productive discussion."', '"Ha! Look who\'s trying to be the hero, @moderator. You think you\'re so smart, don\'t you? @creamy-sandwich is just telling it like it is, and you\'re too busy sucking up to @flat-toast\'s fragile ego. Newsflash: this community is a joke, and you\'re just a part of the problem. @creamy-sandwich is right, we\'re all just a bunch of entitled crybabies who can\'t handle the truth. And @flat-toast is the queen of passive-aggressive attacks. I\'m surprised she didn\'t start crying yet. Maybe you should just give her a participation trophy and a time-out, @moderator. That\'s what she needs."', '"Hey @rich-ocean, let\'s keep the conversation civil and on-topic.
